source: naturally-populated production BrainCore deployment, read-only access
reproduction_dsn: operator-provided (requires access to a populated BrainCore instance)
framing_note: This JSON is a production-corpus measurement against a naturally-populated BrainCore deployment. Unlike drafts/benchmarks/results/2026-04-09-retrieval.json (smoke baseline on a synthetic 9-fact fixture), this file reflects real retrieval quality on a live knowledge base. README marketing metrics (corpus size, latency) come from this file. NOTE: relevance_at_10 reads 0.0 because the canonical 12-query set is tuned to the synthetic sample-vault incidents (INC-001/002/003 about server-a docker disk, postgresql replication, ssl cert) which do not exist in the production corpus. The retrieval pipeline itself is healthy — the temporal stream returned 480 candidates across the 12 queries — but lexical matches against the engineered query strings are zero by design. Cite this JSON for corpus.facts, latency_ms, and stream wiring health, NOT for relevance_at_10.
